xml:space="preserve">All employees, contractors, and authorized users shall utilize only officially approved communication platforms, including Email, Google Chat, and Google Workspace, for conducting organizational business. Users are strictly prohibited from reusing their official email or system passwords on any external or unauthorized websites or applications. All credentials must be kept confidential and handled in accordance with the organization’s information security requirements. Transmission of organizational information shall be conducted solely through official communication channels such as corporate email or authorized fax systems. The reproduction of sensitive or confidential information using external or unauthorized photocopying services is strictly prohibited. Authorized personnel, such as directors, may use digital signatures for secure and authenticated communication where required. All users are responsible for ensuring that their actions do not compromise the organization’s reputation, security, or compliance posture. This includes, but is not limited to, prohibiting activities such as defamation, harassment, impersonation, dissemination of chain messages, or unauthorized transactions or purchases.</w:t></w:r></w:p><w:p w:rsidR="00000000" w:rsidDel="00000000" w:rsidP="00000000" w:rsidRDefault="00000000" w:rsidRPr="00000000" w14:paraId="000001AF"><w:pPr><w:keepNext
